description: Task profiles: canned (target, budget) bundles for common dev tasks. Use `npm run context:cost -- --profile <name>`. Budgets are advisory caps for --pack.

ddfs-feature.note: Add or modify a DDFS feature (state, params, shader injection).

animation.note: Work on keyframes, binders, interpolators, the timeline.

app-boot.note: App entry, boot sequence, feature registration order.

fluid-app.note: Whole fluid-toy app — reachable source from its entrypoint.

mesh-export.note: Mesh export tool — reachable source from its entrypoint.
